name: Haus Of Klaus
summary: CAN YOU ESCAPE THE BUNKER? You've survived a nuclear war - now it's payback time for Klaus Von Klensch, mastermind of the apocalypse! Sneak past or destroy his robot sentries as you search for the bunker's reactor core. Trigger a meltdown and GTFO again - in FIVE MINUTES! With only a handful of weapons and tools (Plasma Pistol, EMP grenade, Locator, Adrenochrome Booster, and of course Toilet Brush) you'll need quick reactions and orbs of steel to succeed in this fun ROGUELITE stealth and survival...
